runners.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an impressive winner after leading throughout, scoring by 1.75 lengths in a OPEN at this track and clocking a lightning 30.19 over the 530m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an impressive winner after leading throughout, scoring by 1.75 lengths in a OPEN at this track and clocking a lightning 30.19 over the 530m trip. Can measure up again if runs up to recent best times.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked first turn.

runners.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at Murray Bridge in 25.64 last time but the start prior clocked a hot 29.78 over 512m finishing third at Mt Gambier. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished third at Murray Bridge in 25.64 last time but the start prior clocked a hot 29.78 over 512m finishing third at Mt Gambier. Has the ability and looks hard to top.

runners.formComment: Won his last three in a row including a good win last start over 530m at Murray Bridge by one length in a Grade 5/6. In winning form and must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won his last three in a row including a good win last start over 530m at Murray Bridge by one length in a Grade 5/6. In winning form and must be included.

runners.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight in a handy (19.60), beating Gold Benz. Will find this a bit tougher, looks up against it this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 0.8 lengths over 350m at Murray Bridge Straight in a handy (19.60), beating Gold Benz. Will find this a bit tougher, looks up against it this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked first turn; Held up for a run turning into home straight.

runners.formComment: Ended last campaign with a seventh (30.64) in a GR 5 at The Meadows and returns after a five months break. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Others appear better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Ended last campaign with a seventh (30.64) in a GR 5 at The Meadows and returns after a five months break. Super consistent fresh, having never missed the frame from three starts. Others appear better placed.

runners.formComment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths third but did record a sharp 30.55 over the 530m journey. Looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame at this track last time when a 1.75 lengths third but did record a sharp 30.55 over the 530m journey. Looking to others this time.

runners.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 530m at this track in a handy 30.47 beating Sinaloa Bandit. In top form and can make it three straight.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 530m at this track in a handy 30.47 beating Sinaloa Bandit. In top form and can make it three straight.

runners.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a NG on April 11 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Cumbria Jack beaten 0.8 lengths (29.41). This appears within his reach.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a NG on April 11 over 520m at Wentworth Park behind Cumbria Jack beaten 0.8 lengths (29.41). This appears within his reach.

runners.formComment: At the last start finished 6th in a Grade 4/5 on March 20 over 460m at Geelong behind Baby Beets beaten 7 lengths (26.33). Major threat on best form.
